lede: The company-wide ledger that every branch posts against. Open it, find any account, seed the standard BFRS chart, and link a new account — all from one screen.

steps.title: Open Chart of Accounts
steps.narration: From the Accounting sidebar, under Ledger, select Chart of Accounts. This is your single company-wide chart — the same accounts are shared across every branch.

steps.title: Find an account fast
steps.narration: With 684 accounts in the chart, use the search box to jump to one by code, name, or number. The Type filter and the Invalid-only switch beside it narrow the list further.

steps.title: Seed the standard chart
steps.narration: Starting a fresh company? Seed Defaults installs the complete BFRS chart of accounts in one click, so you never build the ledger by hand.

steps.title: Add a new account
steps.narration: To create a single account, click Add Account. A side sheet slides in to capture just the details that matter.

steps.title: Choose the account type
steps.narration: Pick the account type the new account inherits from — asset, liability, income, or expense. The number and statement placement follow automatically from the type.

steps.title: Create the account
steps.narration: Click Create Account. The account is written into the company-wide ledger and is instantly available to every branch's postings — no per-branch setup needed.
